pre.note: Measured start of PoTuneLogic-002 run (post PoTuneClean-001)

post.note: Measured 2026-03-09 after all 10 PoTuneLogic-002 suggestions implemented

pendingSuggestions.title: Split ApiEndpointExtensions.cs into 6 VSA endpoint modules
Fix DIP violation in GitHubService: 3 direct new Repository() -> _gitClient.OpenRepository()
Fix N+1 Azure Table scan in ForceReanalysis loop
Replace Thread.Sleep + GC.Collect with await Task.Delay
Add RequireAuthorization to 6 unprotected endpoints; ownership guard on DELETE
Remove duplicate @inject in AddRepository.razor; convert Bootstrap to Radzen
Guard Split('/')[1] in AddRepository.razor; [Required][EmailAddress] on TestLoginRequest
Per-repo SemaphoreSlim concurrency guard in AnalyzeRepositoryCommitsCommandHandler
